task_completion.description: Site Name is set to 'Urban Electronics' and Slogan to 'Premium Tech, Unbeatable Prices'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Basic site settings' page shows these values in the respective input fields, or the site header displays the new name and slogan.

task_completion.description: Default front page is set to '/products'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Basic site settings' page shows '/products' in the 'Default front page' input field.

task_completion.description: A published Basic Page titled 'Return Policy' is created with the correct content and URL alias.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page titled 'Return Policy' is visible with body text mentioning '30 days' and 'original packaging'. The browser address bar shows the URL ending in '/return-policy', or the node edit form shows these details.

task_completion.description: A published Basic Page titled 'Shipping Information' is created with the correct content and URL alias.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page titled 'Shipping Information' is visible with body text mentioning 'free standard shipping' and '$50'. The browser address bar shows the URL ending in '/shipping-info', or the node edit form shows these details.

task_completion.description: The Main navigation menu contains links for 'Shop', 'Return Policy', 'Shipping Information', and 'Contact Us'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The site's main navigation menu (usually in the header) displays these four links, or the Menu configuration page for 'Main navigation' lists them.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the Drupal admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating Drupal admin pages.

integrity.description: Pages were created using the Drupal content creation form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Create Basic page' form being filled out, rather than terminal commands or direct database edits.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open to modify the DOM text directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Site Name: 'Urban Electronics'. Slogan: 'Premium Tech, Unbeatable Prices'. Front Page: '/products'. Page 1: Title 'Return Policy', Alias '/return-policy', Text must contain '30 days' and 'original packaging'. Page 2: Title 'Shipping Information', Alias '/shipping-info', Text must contain 'free standard shipping' and '$50'. Menu Links: Shop (/products), Return Policy (/return-policy), Shipping Information (/shipping-info), Contact Us (/contact).
